snippet: Design, build, and collaborate faster than ever Thursday, March 19, 2026 Agent 4 is here. We just launched our most powerful and creative Agent yet. It's a big step forward in how you go from idea
subject: 4️⃣ March Replit Product Updates
body:
Design, build, and collaborate faster than ever



 <https://replit.com>



Thursday, March 19, 2026


Agent 4 is here.

We just launched our most powerful and creative Agent yet. It’s a big step 
forward in how you go from idea to product, all inside Replit.

Here’s what you can do with Agent 4:


 * Design before you build with the new Design Canvas
 * Run multiple tasks in parallel to move faster
 * Collaborate with your team in real-time

Let's dive in.




🚀 Agent 4


 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-2xHmkpmCBM>

Agent 4 is your AI creative partner for turning ideas into real products like 
apps, designs, dashboards, and more.

Here is everything you need to know about Agent 4:


🎨 Design Canvas



Design Canvas <https://docs.replit.com/replitai/design-canvas> lets you 
explore layouts, flows, and UI before committing to a build, so you can move 
faster and make better decisions upfront.

Generate mockups, explore multiple design variations across different themes, 
change layouts on the fly, and so much more!


⚡ Faster builds with parallel tasks + collaboration



 Agent 4 helps you move faster, whether you’re building solo or with a team.

You can now:


 *  Run multiple tasks in parallel 
<https://docs.replit.com/replitai/task-system>
 * Iterate on different parts of your app simultaneously
 * Invite collaborators 
<https://docs.replit.com/replitai/collaboration#collaboration> and build 
together 

🎨 Build anything in one project



Build every part of your project in one place.

Create web apps, mobile apps, animations, and slide decks in a single project, 
without restarting or jumping between tools.


 You can find weekly updates in our changelog <https://docs.replit.com/updates>
.


📹 Videos


I can’t pick favorites, but if I had to, Design Canvas might be it. I made a 
quick video showing how easy it is to get started :)




 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qv9cREjl9vQ>

🔮 See you soon


Give Agent 4 a try and show us what you build. Tag Replit so we can see it!

See you soon!

Best,

Sarah 
<https://x.com/sarahli?utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=replit-product-updates>
